arts.ttl: Ansu Fati: Hansi Flick opens door to Barcelona return
arts.sum: Hansi Flick opens the door to a Barcelona comeback for Ansu Fati.

arts.ttl: Barcelona were offered the chance to sign a Chelsea star in January
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona were afforded the opportunity to sign a member of the attacking ranks at Chelsea during the January transfer window. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point…

arts.ttl: Pique discusses which current Barca stars would get in his treble-winning team
arts.sum: Gerard Pique admits he’s a big fan of Hansi Flick’s current Barcelona team but isn’t sure many of the current crop would get in his side that won the treble. “I think that those who are there now have to earn it to be in that team, that they can be sure of it because of talent and desire, but they still need to be able to win big titles.”

arts.ttl: Pedri’s performances have seen Barcelona ‘forget about’ long-time transfer target
arts.sum: The ongoing excellence of Barcelona star Pedri has culminated in the club’s transfer team pulling out of the race for a long-time transfer target. That’s according to Relevo, who have…

arts.sum: An update on the wellbeing of Barcelona star Marc-André ter Stegen has on Saturday been forthcoming. Goalkeeper Ter Stegen has for his part of course been sidelined since all the…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick provides positive Marc-Andre Ter Stegen update, sends message to Ansu Fati
arts.sum: It has been a very good start to 2025 for Barcelona, who will hope to carry on their form at the Ramon Sanchez-Pizjuan against Sevilla on Sunday. The players that Hansi Flick relies upon in Andalusia will be interesting to note, given that there has been some changes in recent weeks. In the last week, […] The post Hansi Flick provides positive Marc-Andre Ter Stegen update, sends message to Ansu Fati appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona make SHOCK contract decision after Flick statement
arts.sum: Barcelona are considering extending Wojciech Szczesny's contract beyond this season, according to Spanish media. In September, Barcelona's No.1 goalkeeper Marc-Andre Ter Stegen suffered a season-ending injury, leaving the Catalans with Inaki Pena as their only senior shot-stopper.

arts.ttl: ‘I love working for this club’ - Flick opens up on Barça future
arts.sum: As Barcelona remain in contention to win four trophies this season and are playing some of the best football in their recent history, there’s zero doubt that choosing Hansi Flick as the head coach was a great decision by Joan Laporta last summer. One season and two [overall] years for a coach is a long time.”
